name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.PointGunHelper.FallingSupport
summary: Allow supporting of a rifle(or two handed pistol) when falling. 0 = false, 1 = support if allowed, 2 = support until constraint not active (don't allow support to restart), 3 = support until constraint not effective (support hand to support distance must be less than 0.15 - don't allow support to restart).
remarks:
Default value = 1.
            Min value = 0.
            Max value = 3.
